title: AI vs. me: Can we beat artificial intelligence in predicting NCAA tournament?
description: A professor who runs computer models for NCAA brackets says you’re more likely to win Powerball and Mega Millions in the same week than get a perfect NCAA tournament bracket. But that isn’t going to stop us from competing with AI on filling out our bracket.
content:
CLEVELAND, Ohio – This is the time of year when everyone is a college basketball expert.
But really there is only one expert: Sheldon Jacobson, a professor of computer science at the University of Illinois. His de facto title should be brackets guru:... [5796 chars]

title: Team India Coach Gautam Gambhir Moves Delhi High Court, Seeks ₹2.5 Crore Damages Over AI Deepfake Videos
description: Indian cricket team head coach Gautam Gambhir has approached the Delhi High Court after alleging misuse of his identity through AI-generated deepfake videos and unauthorized online content. The development has drawn significant attention, highlighting growing concerns over digital manipulation and personality rights in the era of artificial intelligence.
